-1, 'post_type' => ['post', 'page'], 'post_status' => 'any', ]); foreach ($posts as $post) { wp_delete_post($post->ID, true); } $post_id = wp_insert_post([ 'import_id' => 123, 'post_title' => 'HELLO turns comments into a room', 'post_name' => 'hello-demo', 'post_content' => '

HELLO keeps the native WordPress comment form and gives every post a Beeper-ready Matrix room.

Readers can comment here like they always have, or jump into Beeper and keep the same conversation moving there.

The open web gets the durable archive. Chat gets the quick back-and-forth.

Scroll to the comments to see the visitor experience: normal WordPress comments, plus a HELLO button that opens the matching room.

', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post', 'comment_status' => 'open', ]); update_post_meta($post_id, '_hello_room_id', '!zSoNBKCjOmubTNItrP:beeper.com'); update_post_meta($post_id, '_hello_room_alias', '#hello-wp-demo:beeper.com'); $comments = [ [ 'author' => 'Maya Chen', 'content' => 'This feels like the missing bridge between blog comments and real-time discussion.', 'origin' => 'wordpress', 'matrix_id' => '', 'event_id' => '', ], [ 'author' => 'hellowp', 'content' => 'Matrix side check-in: this is the same conversation, just from Beeper.', 'origin' => 'matrix', 'matrix_id' => '@hellowp:beeper.com', 'event_id' => '$hello-demo-1', ], [ 'author' => 'Ari on Beeper', 'content' => 'I like that the post still owns the archive. Chat can move fast without losing the public thread.', 'origin' => 'matrix', 'matrix_id' => '@ari-demo:beeper.com', 'event_id' => '$hello-demo-2', ], [ 'author' => 'Jordan Rivera', 'content' => 'Leaving a normal WordPress comment still works exactly the way I expect.', 'origin' => 'wordpress', 'matrix_id' => '', 'event_id' => '', ], ]; foreach ($comments as $index => $comment) { $comment_id = wp_insert_comment([ 'comment_post_ID' => $post_id, 'comment_author' => $comment['author'], 'comment_author_email' => 'demo' . $index . '@example.com', 'comment_author_url' => '', 'comment_content' => $comment['content'], 'comment_type' => 'comment', 'comment_approved' => 1, 'comment_date' => gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() - ((4 - $index) * 300)), 'comment_date_gmt' => gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() - ((4 - $index) * 300)), ]); if ($comment_id && $comment['origin'] === 'matrix') { add_comment_meta($comment_id, '_hello_origin', 'matrix', true); add_comment_meta($comment_id, '_hello_synced', '1', true); add_comment_meta($comment_id, '_hello_matrix_id', $comment['matrix_id'], true); add_comment_meta($comment_id, '_hello_event_id', $comment['event_id'], true); } } wp_update_comment_count_now($post_id); flush_rewrite_rules();
